examples.eng: Where should I drop you off?
I'll drop you off on my way home.
examples.ru: Я подвезу тебя по дороге домой.

examples.eng: She dropped off the kids at school.
He dropped off the package at the office.
Interest in the project dropped off.
Sales dropped off after the holidays.
Can you drop me off at the station?
examples.ru: Ты можешь высадить меня на станции?

examples.eng: He dropped me off at the corner of the street.
examples.ru: Он высадил меня на углу улицы.

examples.eng: Drop off the passengers at the hotel.
Sales are expected to drop off.
I was sitting in the armchair reading the newspaper when I dropped off.
examples.ru: Я сидел в кресле и читал газету и не заметил, как задремал.

examples.eng: I had a bad night. I went to bed early enough but for some reason I couldn't drop off.
examples.ru: Сегодня я плохо спал. Я рано лёг, но никак не мог уснуть, не знаю, почему.

examples.eng: My interest in photography has dropped off over the years.
examples.ru: Мой интерес к фотографии за эти годы угас.

examples.eng: The magazine got thinner, and the writing quality dropped off.
examples.ru: Сам журнал стал тоньше, и качество материалов упало.
